nodes.context: Canadian outlaw motorcycle club based in Southern Ontario, founded in 1948. Involved in criminal activities including firearms, narcotics, and illegal lottery.
Long-time ally of Original Red Devils MC; absorbed the Red Devils' three chapters in 2014.
Outlaw motorcycle club; had good relationships with Original Red Devils MC according to reporter Peter Edwards.

edges.context: Original Red Devils MC patched over to Bacchus MC in late 2014, with all three chapters joining. Members sport a brotherhood patch indicating a lasting 1% bond.
Original Red Devils MC had good relationships with Hells Angels, as stated by crime reporter Peter Edwards.
